predictions.source_quote: Global economic growth will decelerate next year to 3.6% from 3.8% in 2018
CIO sees the recent sell off in crude oil prices as overdone, and expects prices to rise towards USD 85/barrel over the next six to 12 months

The Chinese yuan should continue to decline, easing 5% in trade-weighted terms against a backdrop of ongoing US-China trade tensions, slowing Chinese economic growth, and a diminishing current account surplus.
